title: 1. Skip the research paper.
content:
1. Skip the research paper.
2. Only complete the annotated bibliography & final reflection.
3. Take over the class for one lecture.
• Symbolism of three in religion, mythology, and storytelling is built into this.

Question 3: Should the Research Paper & Peer Review Weeks Be Spread Out More?

✔ Solution: Keep Weeks 11-15 Focused, But Allow Opt-Out Paths
• Students only do the full research paper if they choose Path B.
• Other paths allow alternative final projects.
• This prevents students from being overwhelmed at the end of the semester.

Question 4: Does the Class Maintain a Good Balance Between Instructor Guidance & Student Independence?

✔ Yes, because:
• The first half of the semester is more guided.
• The last third is mostly student-driven (independent research, peer reviews, mastery challenges).
• Students have multiple paths to success.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 77 (chunk 77/108)
